# Bug reports

Thanks for taking the time to file a bug. A good bug report is the difference
between a 5-minute fix and a 3-day investigation.

## What did you do?

<!-- The exact `cargo run` / `curl` / SQL / dashboard action. -->

```text

```

## What did you expect?

<!-- One sentence. -->

## What happened instead?

<!-- Full error message, stack trace, screenshot. If the query returned
     wrong results, paste the expected vs actual rows. -->

```text

```

## Environment

- OS / arch (e.g. macOS 14 arm64, Ubuntu 24.04 x86_64):
- Rust version (`rustc --version`):
- rspark version (`cargo run -p rspark-cli -- --version` or commit hash):
- Source format of any input data (CSV / JSON):

## Logs

<!-- If you're running the master or a worker, set `RSPARK_LOG=debug` and
     paste the relevant lines here. Don't paste the full log; trim to the
     first error and a few lines of context. -->
